message:
test(lab+dns+config): B10 wave 10 invariant tests + fix process.rs compile error

lab/network/config.rs (20 new tests):
- NetworkConfig: Default values/Debug/Clone
- NetworkConditions: all 7 factory methods (ideal/local/lan/wan/lossy/satellite/congested)/Debug/Clone
- LatencyModel: Debug/Clone/LogNormal positive output/Uniform min>max edge case
- JitterModel: Debug/Clone/Uniform zero max/Bursty zero ranges
- duration_from_secs_f64: negative/NaN/infinity/valid

net/dns/lookup.rs (18 new tests):
- LookupIp: empty/Debug+Clone/first/iter/into_iter owned+ref/ipv4_only/ipv6_only
- HappyEyeballs: empty/from_lookup/v4_only/v6_only/Debug+Clone
- LookupSrv/SrvRecord: Debug+Clone
- LookupMx/MxRecord: Debug+Clone
- LookupTxt: Debug+Clone/empty

runtime/config.rs (6 new tests):
- ObligationLeakResponse: Clone/Copy
- LeakEscalation: Debug/Eq/Clone/Copy
- BlockingPoolConfig: Default/Clone
- RuntimeConfig: Clone

fix(process): resolve tracing macro name collision in test_process_error_display
- Variables `display`/`debug` collided with tracing::field functions inside
  assert_with_log! macro expansion; extracted to local bools to avoid shadowing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
